heroTagline: My favorite place in this world has always been beside you.

story.title: The Day We Met
story.text: Valentine's Day gave us the perfect start. The moment our eyes met, everything else faded away. Your smile made the whole world feel softer, and I knew right then that you were someone special.

story.title: Ghandruk - Our Mountain Escape
story.text: We escaped to Ghandruk in the mountains, where we could be alone with the sky and each other. Miles away from everything, surrounded by snow-capped peaks and terraced fields. We realized that adventure with you feels like home.

story.title: Pokhara - Our Lake Escape
story.text: Barefoot by Fewa Lake in Pokhara, watching the sunset paint the sky just for us. We danced by the shore and made memories that I'll treasure forever. That magical lakeside will always be our place.

story.title: Chitwan - Our Jungle Adventure
story.text: In the heart of Chitwan, surrounded by wild beauty and nature's grandeur. We walked through forests, spotted wildlife together, and every moment felt like we were exploring the world as one. You made the jungle feel like a romantic paradise.

story.title: Sikkim - Our Hidden Paradise
story.text: We found this magical hidden paradise in Sikkim, nestled in the mountains with misty valleys and ancient forests. Among the rhododendrons, prayer flags, and quiet paths, I realized that with you, even the most remote places feel like home. It was ours and ours alone.

story.title: Stargazing Under the Night Sky
story.text: Lying under the stars, you pointed out constellations while I pointed at you and said, 'That's my favorite view.' From Ghandruk to Pokhara to Chitwan to Sikkim, nothing compares to these moments with you.

gallery.cap: A random Tuesday, still my favorite
The one where you weren't ready

loveLetter:
Happy Birthday, my love. ❤️🎂

I wish I could be there to celebrate this special day with you, but until then, please know that my heart is always with you. Distance may keep us apart, but it could never lessen my love for you.

Thank you for being the most beautiful part of my life. I hope today brings you endless smiles, happiness, and everything your heart wishes for. You deserve all the love in the world.

I miss you so much, and I can't wait for the day we celebrate your birthday together. Until then, I'll keep loving you from afar.

Happy Birthday once again, my princess. I love you endlessly. ❤️
reasons: The way you say my name
How you make everyone feel seen
Your bad jokes that still make me smile
How you dance in the kitchen
How you fight for what you believe in
The way you handle bad days
The way you care for others
How you say 'we' instead of 'you' or 'me'
How safe I feel with you
The way you look when you're concentrating
How you make me want to be better
How you remember my coffee order
How you make a house feel like home
How you love your people fiercely
The way you hold my hand
How you make me laugh until I can't breathe
Your smell after a long day
The way you look at me when you think I'm not looking
Simply — you, exactly as you are

futureDreams.title: Watch the Northern Lights
futureDreams.text: Let's chase the sky until it's painted with our own private light show.

futureDreams.title: Build our dream home
futureDreams.text: A place filled with quiet mornings, laughter, and all the little comforts we create together.

futureDreams.title: Travel to a new city
futureDreams.text: To lose ourselves in new streets and bring back a new story to whisper about.

futureDreams.title: Adopt a puppy
futureDreams.text: A little life to love with us, to share in every cozy day and silly adventure.

bucketList: Travel somewhere neither of us has been
Watch a sunrise from a rooftop
Learn something new, side by side
Cook a whole holiday meal together, from scratch
Grow old, still choosing each other

memoryStars.title: Our First Meeting
memoryStars.text: Valentine's Day 2026 — the day everything changed. Your smile was the first beautiful thing I knew I'd want to remember forever.

memoryStars.title: Mountain Adventure
memoryStars.text: High above the world, just you and me. We breathed in the fresh air and realized that's when we truly felt alive together.

memoryStars.title: Beach at Sunset
memoryStars.text: Our feet in the sand, the ocean in front of us, and endless love in our hearts. That beach will always be ours.

memoryStars.title: City Wandering
memoryStars.text: Lost in a beautiful city together. Every street we took, every wrong turn — they all led us to perfect moments.

memoryStars.title: The Garden
memoryStars.text: Among the flowers and quiet paths, I fell in love with you all over again.

memoryStars.title: Stargazing Night
memoryStars.text: Under infinite stars, I realized you're the brightest thing in my sky.

memoryStars.title: Our Journey
memoryStars.text: From Valentine's Day to starlit nights, every place we traveled became a piece of our love story.

finalMessage: Every star above, every page in this little world, every year still to come — it's all for you. Happy birthday on July 23rd. Thank you for being the best part of my every day.
birthdayMessage:
Happy Birthday, my love. ❤️🎂

I wish I could be there to celebrate this special day with you, but until then, please know that my heart is always with you. Distance may keep us apart, but it could never lessen my love for you.

Thank you for being the most beautiful part of my life. I hope today brings you endless smiles, happiness, and everything your heart wishes for. You deserve all the love in the world.

I miss you so much, and I can't wait for the day we celebrate your birthday together. Until then, I'll keep loving you from afar.

Happy Birthday once again, my princess. I love you endlessly. ❤️
